idlc-income-fund.exit: Exit load 2% if held under 90 days, 1.5% for 90 to 180 days, 1% for 180 to 360 days, none after 1 year

idlc-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
idlc-growth-fund.exit: Exit load up to 2% (set by the AMC board); no entry load

idlc-aml-shariah-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
idlc-aml-shariah-fund.exit: Exit load up to 2% (set by the AMC board); no entry load
